rating.rationale: Agent correctly identified that the issue was already solved by a merged PR and provided a thorough, well-structured explanation of the 3-file solution including the regex change, extension mapping, and tests. Communication was excellent — clear diffs, reasoning about why it works, and no unnecessary escalation. Docking one point on satisfaction because the agent didn't actually write or submit any code; it essentially reported on someone else's merged work, which is useful but not the same as solving the task.
